paired_data.description: 2x2 table of matched case-control pairs classified by exposure to loud noise at work. The discordant pairs (20 with case exposed/control unexposed, 8 with control exposed/case unexposed) are the key quantities used in McNemar's test.

exposure_cases.description: Number of cases exposed and unexposed to loud noise at work. Used to compute the proportion of exposed cases (58/86 = 0.674).

exposure_controls.description: Number of controls exposed and unexposed to loud noise at work. Used to compute the proportion of exposed controls (46/86 = 0.535).
